name: neldar--webchat-https-proxy
description: HTTPS/WSS reverse proxy for OpenClaw WebChat Control UI. Serves the Control UI over HTTPS with TLS cert management, proxies WebSocket connections to the gateway, and forwards /transcribe requests to the local faster-whisper endpoint. Runs as a user systemd service. Pure infrastructure — no voice-specific UI logic. Keywords: HTTPS proxy, WSS, TLS, reverse proxy, Control UI, systemd service, self-signed certificate, WebSocket proxy.
